long_description:
Patch Snapshot resources stuck for deletion to clean up the stuck resource in LON RIAS

Region: LON
RIAS
Jumpod : Yes

1. 

for n in $(kubectl get storagesnapshots -A -o json | jq -r '.items[] | select(.spec.referenceVolumeID=="r018-b20f9db0-1c44-47c0-83d6-877392873caa") | select(.status.failureReason=="VolumeAlreadyLocked")| "\(.metadata.name)"'); do
name=$(echo $n | awk '{print $1}');
kubectl patch storagesnapshots -n 0f628e88c6594675bbefa097a63b9293 "$name" --type=merge -p '{"metadata":{"finalizers":[]}}';
done


2. After ~5 minutes run following command to verify all the hanging resources for deletion got cleaned up

Previous incident reference : https://watson.service-now.com/now/nav/ui/classic/params/target/incident.do%3Fsysparm_query%3Dnumber%3DINC10445858
kubectl get storagesnapshots -A -o json | jq -r '.items[] | select(.spec.referenceVolumeID=="r018-b20f9db0-1c44-47c0-83d6-877392873caa") | select(.status.failureReason=="VolumeAlreadyLocked")| "\(.metadata.namespace) \(.metadata.name)"'
Incident source: https://ibm-cloudplatform.slack.com/archives/C02JSL04PU0/p1765069351396689 - Arun Gopinathan
